title: aster fragilis var. brachypholis
intro: Aster fragilis var. brachypholis, also known as brittle aster, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of the world. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to inhibit inflammation and reduce fever, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. The health benefits of Aster fragilis var. brachypholis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the severity of respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers to be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
